case_title: LINKS ELECTRIC INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP. VS L. R. FREE IN. A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LINKS ELECTRIC INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT L. R. FREE IN. A CORPORATION MAGIC PAN A CAL CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINKS ELECTRIC INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT L. R. FREE IN. A CORPORATION MAGIC PAN A CAL CORP. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,008.00, INCLUDES CASE #717721 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
